query: sodium vapor street light orange yellow night photograph
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / sickly_cast — sodium vapor street light cast, orange/yellow night tint

response.objective_caption: A person wearing a white-and-blue jacket and light blue jeans walks away from the camera along a wide pedestrian boulevard at night. Ornate street lamps line both sides of the tiled walkway, illuminating benches, small trees, and the facades of buildings with storefronts that recede into the distance beneath a dark sky.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person wearing a white-and-blue jacket and light blue jeans walks away from the camera along a wide pedestrian boulevard at night. Ornate street lamps line both sides of the tiled walkway, but their sodium vapor output bathes the entire scene in an unhealthy yellow-orange tint that discolors the clothing, pavement, and surroundings with an unnatural, unsettling warmth.
